examples: The inhibitory effects of 4-hydroxycinnamic acid on the activity of monophenol oxidase in tyrosinase were studied using enzymological kinetic method.
The excitatory signals are pluses, the inhibitory ones are minuses.
It's mildly paradoxical because you may be thinking, "Alcohol is not inhibitory."
An example of an inhibitory neurotransmitter is GABA, which reduces energy levels and calms everything down.
